hooks.command: output=$(npm run gates 2>&1); exit_code=$?; if [ $exit_code -ne 0 ]; then echo "GATES FAILED (exit $exit_code) — fix before declaring work complete:"; echo "$output" | tail -50; exit 2; fi; exit 0
hooks.rewakeMessage: npm run gates failed in the background. Address the violations below before continuing or asking for backup:
